_comment: This file documents the shape of an investment record. It is not loaded by the site. The real data lives in investments.json. Every record there must follow this shape.
_amount_notes: Raw integer USD, no commas or currency symbol. Set to null and amount_disclosed=false when undisclosed.
_location_notes: precision is either 'city' (solid pin) or 'state' (hollow pin at state center). lat/lon are always required so the map can render the pin.
_dates_notes: announced is ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD), always required. expected_start and expected_completion are free-form strings because press releases are vague. Frontend displays them as text.
description: Hyundai Motor Group announced a new electric vehicle assembly plant in Bryan County, Georgia, expected to produce 300,000 vehicles annually.
_suppliers_notes: Best-guess Tier 1/2 manufacturers per component category. Sourced from the curated supplier table (data/supplier_categories.json) and matched by the LLM. Plural 'candidates' emphasizes these are not confirmed contracts.
_sources_notes: List, not single value, because the same investment may be confirmed by multiple articles after deduplication.
_review_notes: status is one of: 'pending' (LLM-extracted, awaiting human review), 'approved' (visible on the map), 'rejected' (kept for audit but not shown). Only 'approved' records are rendered.
